title: Implement optimizer score docs reorganization and terminology cleanup
description: Implement the approved documentation reorganization for optimizer-facing score docs. Replace placeholder docs, restructure score-yaml-format around reusable techniques, make optimizer-cookbook heuristic-only, normalize MCP docs registration around a shared catalog, and remove FP/FN shorthand from optimizer-facing text.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Work started

Started implementation of the optimizer score docs reorganization and terminology cleanup.

Immediate steps:
- inspect existing in-worktree changes in target docs and optimizer YAML
- replace placeholder docs with canonical content
- normalize MCP docs registry around a shared catalog
- remove optimizer-facing FP/FN shorthand in favor of explicit predicted/actual segment wording
- run targeted tests and push the branch for CI verification
